no_room_types: You have no room types set up. Please add at least one in the 'Rooms > Room Types' section to get started.
no_rooms: No physical rooms assigned to this type.

confirm_change.title: Confirm Reservation Change
confirm_change.description: Please review the changes below and confirm to update the reservation.
confirm_change.availability_check_description: The system will double-check for conflicts before confirming the update. If the new slot is unavailable, the change will be rejected.

toasts.invalid_duration_description: A reservation must be for at least one night.
toasts.conflict_resize_description: The requested dates conflict with another booking for {{roomName}}.
toasts.conflict_move_description: The new slot for this reservation is blocked or overlaps with another booking for {{roomName}}.
toasts.update_error_description: Failed to update the reservation. Please try again.
toasts.reservation_not_found_error: Could not find the reservation to move. Please refresh and try again.
toasts.missing_room_type_data: Could not find the new room type's data.
toasts.guest_count_high_description: The selected room type '{{roomTypeName}}' only allows a maximum of {{maxGuests}} guests. This reservation has {{guestCount}}.
toasts.data_missing_description: Cannot pre-fill reservation; room or room type data is missing.

access_denied_description: You do not have permission to view or manage the calendar. Please contact an administrator.
